title: Make admin page clearly accessible from the UI

requirements.text: Add a clearly visible but discreet admin access link in the site footer (e.g., labeled 'Admin') in the Layout.tsx component that navigates to the /admin route, so administrators can find and access the admin login page without needing to know the direct URL.

quotes: unsure about admin page as i cannot find it on version 8

acceptanceCriteria: A link labeled 'Admin' (or equivalent) is visible in the site footer on all pages.
Clicking the admin link navigates the user to the /admin route.
The ProtectedAdminRoute renders the AdminLoginForm when the user is not authenticated.
The admin link is visually unobtrusive (small, muted styling) so it does not distract regular customers.
The link is present on both desktop and mobile layouts.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ (immutable paths).
Do not change the existing admin authentication logic in useAdminAuth.tsx or ProtectedAdminRoute.tsx.
nonGoals: Changing the admin password or authentication mechanism.
Redesigning the admin bookings page layout.
Adding a prominent top-navigation admin link that is highly visible to all users.
